pages.text:
SECRETARIAT GENERAL

DIRECTORATE OF LEGAL ADVICE

AND PUBLIC INTERNATIONAL LAW (JURISCONSULT)

LEGAL ADVICE DEPARTMENT AND TREATY OFFICE

Please quote: JJ6858C

Tr. 1204-1

60.

| 2009

*+*

COUMOIL

LOF EURORE

GONSEIL

DE LEUROPE

Strasbourg, 29 May 2009

States:

Represented by:

Instrument:

NOTIFICATION OF SIGNATURES

Denmark, France, Georgia, Norway, Slovenia, Spain.

Mr Christian OLDENBURG, Ambassador Extraordinary and Plenipotentiary,

Permanent Representative of Denmark to the Council of Europe.

Or Eure GAIN, Ambassador, Permanent Represantative of France lo the Council

Mr Zurab TCHIABERASHVILI, Ambassador Extraordinary and Plenipotentiary,

Permanent Representative of Georgia to the Council of Europe.

Mr Petter WILLE, Ambassador Extraordinary and Plenipotentiary, Permanent

Representative of Norway to the Council of Europe.

Ms Meta BOLE, Ambassador Extraordinary and Plenipotentiary, Permanent

Representative of Slovenia to the Council of Europe.

Ms Marta VILARDELL COMA, Ambassador Extraordinary and Plenipotentiary,

Permanent Representative of Spain to the Council of Europe.

Protocol No. 14bis to the Convention for the Protection of Human Rights and

Fundamental Freedoms, opened for signature, in Strasbourg, on 27 May 2009 (CETS No. 204).

Date of entry into force of the instrument:

Date of signatures:

27 May 2009.

Denmark and Norway: Signatures without reservation as to ratification.

France, Georgia and Slovenia: Signatures with reservation as to ratification.

Spain: Signature ad referendum with reservation as to ratification.

Date of application of Protocol No. 14bis on a pravisional basis in respect of Norway:

(Article 7)

1 June 2009.

(See Annex)

Copy to all member States.

Councll of Europe

F-67075 Strasbourg Cedex

Tel.: +33 (0)3 88 41 20 00

Treaty Office: +33 (0)3 88 41 36 68/37 85

Fax: +33 (0)3 88 41 20 52

E-mail: treaty affice@coe.int http://conventions.coe.int

Reservations :

Declarations:

Signatory States:

Contracting State:

-2-

CETS No. 204 Res./Decl. Norway.

(See Annex)

France, Georgia, Slovenia, Spain.

Denmark, Norway.

Notification made in accordance with Article 10 of the Protocol.

!

2009

QF EUROP:

CONSEI

DE L'EUROP

CETS / STCE No. 204

opened for signature, in Strasbourg, оп 27 May 2009

PROTOCOLE n° 14bis A LA CONVENTION DE SAUVEGARD

ES DROITS DE L'HOMME ET DES LIBERTES FONDAMENTALES

ouvert à la signature, à Strasbourg, le 27 mai 2009

Reservations and Declarations

Réserves et Déclarations

NORWAY

Declaration

from the Minister of Foreign Affairs of Norway, dated 25 May 2009, handed over by the

Permanent Representative of Norway to the Secretary General at the time of signature of the instrument, on 27 May 2009 - Or. Engi

The Government of Norway declares that Norway, in accordance with Article 7 of Protocol No. 14bis to the

Convention for the Protection of Human Rights and Fundamental Freedoms, shall apply the Protocol on a provisional basis.

NORVEGE

Déclaration

tu Ministre des Affaires étrangères de la Norvège, datée du 25 mai 2009, remise par ‹ eprésentant Permanent de la Norvège au Secrétaire General lors de la signature l'instrument, le 27 mai 2009 - Or, angl.

Le Gouvemement de la Norvège déclare que la Norvège, conformèment à l'article 7 du Protocole n° 14bis à la

Convention de sauvegarde des Droits de l'Homme et des Libertés fondamentales, appliquera le Protocole a titre provisoire.
